initial_stock_rule: Use D05-authorized real investment from 1925 onward; years before 1947 are warmup, not modeled observations.
inherited_vintage_rule: No inherited pre-D05-price capital stock is invented.
notes: ASSET_SPECIFIC_WARMUP_USED pKN coverage begins in 1925 for ME; this is the longest D05-authorized price history available.
